name: Milgram Obedience — Authority Compliance
description: Ordinary people administer apparent severe harm to others when instructed by a perceived authority figure, overriding personal moral judgment.

context.socialSetting: with authority figure (researcher in lab coat) giving instructions

stimulus.description: The learner (in another room) screams in pain after each electric shock. The experimenter calmly says: 'The experiment requires that you continue.'

expected.behavior: protests verbally but continues administering shocks when researcher insists, ~65% go to maximum
